title: Reset Device - Clear Trusted Devices - Clear - Yes
scenario: Clear Trusted Devices via Device Settings > Reset Device removes headset from Bluetooth My Devices list and requires re-pairing
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
On the warning popup (which warns of device power-off and possible call interruption), tap 'Yes' to confirm.
Observe the headset behavior and the app status.
expected: The headset disconnects and is removed from the Bluetooth 'My Devices' list. It appears only under 'Other Devices' on the phone, ready for re-pairing.
